cards.name: The Fool
cards.meaning: Beginnings, curiosity, stepping into the unknown.
cards.advice: You may be starting a new chapter or considering a path that feels uncertain. Instead of waiting until everything is perfectly planned, allow yourself to move forward with curiosity. Stay aware of risks, but do not let fear stop you from exploring possibilities. Learning comes through experience.

cards.name: The Magician
cards.meaning: Skill, initiative, and turning ideas into action.
cards.advice: Look closely at what resources and abilities you already have. You may be more capable than you think. Take practical steps toward your goal and use your knowledge creatively. Confidence grows when you actively apply your skills rather than waiting for the perfect moment.

cards.name: The High Priestess
cards.advice: This situation may require patience and observation rather than immediate action. Pay attention to subtle feelings and instincts. Give yourself time to understand what is happening beneath the surface before making a decision.

cards.name: The Empress
cards.advice: Focus on creating an environment where ideas, relationships, or personal wellbeing can grow naturally. Support the things that matter to you with patience and attention. Progress often comes through steady care rather than force.

cards.name: The Emperor
cards.advice: This is a time to establish order and clear direction. Take responsibility for your choices and build a strong foundation. Discipline and careful planning will help you move forward confidently.

cards.name: The Hierophant
cards.advice: Consider seeking advice from someone experienced or learning from established practices. Sometimes following proven wisdom can provide stability when facing uncertainty.

cards.name: The Lovers
cards.advice: Think carefully about what truly aligns with your values and emotions. Whether this concerns relationships or decisions, honesty and clear communication will guide you toward the right direction.

cards.name: The Chariot
cards.advice: Stay focused on your objective and avoid distractions. Success may require discipline and persistence. Trust your ability to steer through challenges and maintain control of your path.

cards.name: Strength
cards.advice: Real strength often appears as calmness and understanding rather than force. Approach challenges with patience and kindness, both toward yourself and others.

cards.name: The Hermit
cards.advice: Take time to step back from noise and distractions. Quiet reflection may help you understand what direction truly feels meaningful.

cards.name: Wheel of Fortune
cards.advice: Life moves in cycles, and situations may change quickly. Stay adaptable and look for opportunities within transitions rather than resisting them.

cards.name: Justice
cards.advice: Examine the situation carefully and consider the consequences of your actions. Acting with honesty and balance will lead to better outcomes.

cards.name: The Hanged Man
cards.advice: Progress might require a moment of stillness. Consider viewing the situation from a different perspective and allow yourself time to reconsider assumptions.

cards.name: Death
cards.advice: Certain phases must end for new growth to begin. Accepting change may feel difficult, but it allows space for something better to develop.

cards.name: Temperance
cards.advice: Avoid extremes and try to find a balanced approach. Small adjustments and patience will help create stability.

cards.name: The Devil
cards.advice: Take an honest look at patterns that may be restricting your freedom or wellbeing. Awareness is the first step toward breaking unhealthy cycles.

cards.name: The Tower
cards.advice: Unexpected events may disrupt existing plans, but they often reveal truths that were hidden. Focus on rebuilding stronger foundations afterward.

cards.name: The Star
cards.advice: Allow yourself time to recover from difficulties and look forward with optimism. Gentle progress and self-care will restore confidence.

cards.name: The Moon
cards.advice: Things may not be completely clear right now. Avoid rushing decisions and trust your instincts while you gather more information.

cards.name: The Sun
cards.advice: Celebrate progress and allow yourself to experience happiness fully. Positive energy can strengthen your confidence and relationships.

cards.name: Judgement
cards.advice: Take time to review past experiences and learn from them. Honest self-reflection can guide your next steps.

cards.name: The World
cards.advice: Recognize how far you have come. Completing one stage of life prepares you for the next opportunity.

cards.name: Ace of Cups
cards.advice: Be open to new feelings, relationships, or creative inspiration. Allow yourself to experience emotions honestly.

cards.name: Two of Cups
cards.advice: Focus on mutual respect and communication in relationships. Shared understanding strengthens bonds.

cards.name: Three of Cups
cards.advice: Spend time appreciating the people who support you and celebrate small successes together.

cards.name: Four of Cups
cards.advice: You may be overlooking opportunities because of distraction or dissatisfaction. Take a fresh look at what is available.

cards.name: Five of Cups
cards.advice: Allow yourself to acknowledge sadness, but remember that not everything is lost. Focus on what still remains.

cards.name: Six of Cups
cards.advice: Reconnect with positive influences from your past while remaining open to the present.

cards.name: Seven of Cups
cards.advice: Many possibilities may appear attractive, but clarity comes from careful evaluation.

cards.name: Eight of Cups
cards.advice: If something no longer supports your growth, consider whether it is time to move on.

cards.name: Nine of Cups
cards.advice: Take time to appreciate achievements and moments of happiness.

cards.name: Ten of Cups
cards.advice: Focus on creating harmony and supportive relationships.

cards.name: Page of Cups
cards.advice: Allow imagination and emotional openness to guide you toward new experiences.

cards.name: Knight of Cups
cards.advice: Follow your passions but remain grounded in reality.

cards.name: Queen of Cups
cards.advice: Offer kindness to others while maintaining emotional balance.

cards.name: King of Cups
cards.advice: Lead with calm understanding when handling emotional situations.

cards.name: Ace of Pentacles
cards.advice: Take practical steps toward building something stable and meaningful.

cards.name: Two of Pentacles
cards.advice: Organize priorities and remain flexible as circumstances shift.

cards.name: Three of Pentacles
cards.advice: Working with others can improve results and strengthen abilities.

cards.name: Four of Pentacles
cards.advice: Protect your resources but remain open to sharing when appropriate.

cards.name: Five of Pentacles
cards.advice: Seek support and remember that challenges are temporary.

cards.name: Six of Pentacles
cards.advice: Balance giving and receiving support.

cards.name: Seven of Pentacles
cards.advice: Continue nurturing long-term efforts.

cards.name: Eight of Pentacles
cards.advice: Practice consistently to improve your abilities.

cards.name: Nine of Pentacles
cards.advice: Enjoy the results of your effort and appreciate your progress.

cards.name: Ten of Pentacles
cards.advice: Think about long-term security and shared prosperity.

cards.name: Page of Pentacles
cards.advice: Stay curious and explore practical knowledge.

cards.name: Knight of Pentacles
cards.advice: Steady effort will bring results.

cards.name: Queen of Pentacles
cards.advice: Balance material responsibilities with personal wellbeing.

cards.name: King of Pentacles
cards.advice: Focus on decisions that create lasting stability.

cards.name: Ace of Swords
cards.advice: Approach the situation with honesty and clear thinking.

cards.name: Two of Swords
cards.advice: Avoid ignoring decisions that require attention.

cards.name: Three of Swords
cards.advice: Healing begins with acknowledging the truth.

cards.name: Four of Swords
cards.advice: Take time to restore your mental energy.

cards.name: Five of Swords
cards.advice: Consider whether continuing a dispute is worthwhile.

cards.name: Six of Swords
cards.advice: Move toward environments that bring peace.

cards.name: Seven of Swords
cards.advice: Be mindful of honesty and trust in your actions.

cards.name: Eight of Swords
cards.advice: Recognize where fear may be limiting your choices.

cards.name: Nine of Swords
cards.advice: Share concerns with someone you trust instead of carrying them alone.

cards.name: Ten of Swords
cards.advice: Allow yourself to move forward after difficult experiences.

cards.name: Page of Swords
cards.advice: Observe carefully before acting.

cards.name: Knight of Swords
cards.advice: Move forward with determination but avoid impulsive decisions.

cards.name: Queen of Swords
cards.advice: Speak honestly and rely on logic when evaluating situations.

cards.name: King of Swords
cards.advice: Use knowledge and fairness when making decisions.

cards.name: Ace of Wands
cards.advice: Follow ideas that excite your curiosity and creativity.

cards.name: Two of Wands
cards.advice: Think carefully about future possibilities before acting.

cards.name: Three of Wands
cards.advice: Look beyond your current environment for opportunities.

cards.name: Four of Wands
cards.advice: Appreciate moments of harmony and shared success.

cards.name: Five of Wands
cards.advice: Use challenges as motivation for improvement.

cards.name: Six of Wands
cards.advice: Accept praise while remaining humble.

cards.name: Seven of Wands
cards.advice: Defend your beliefs with confidence.

cards.name: Eight of Wands
cards.advice: Be prepared to act quickly when opportunities appear.

cards.name: Nine of Wands
cards.advice: Stay determined even after facing difficulties.

cards.name: Ten of Wands
cards.advice: Consider sharing or reducing burdens.

cards.name: Page of Wands
cards.advice: Allow curiosity to guide new adventures.

cards.name: Knight of Wands
cards.advice: Pursue your goals with energy but avoid recklessness.

cards.name: Queen of Wands
cards.advice: Express your ideas openly and inspire others.

cards.name: King of Wands
cards.advice: Lead with passion and guide others toward shared goals.
